en: So these three men ceased to answer Job, because he was righteous in his own eyes.
zh: 因為約伯自以為義，於是這三個人就不再回答他。

en: Then Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite, of the family of Ram, burned with anger. He burned with anger at Job because he justified himself rather than God.
zh: 那時，布西人蘭族巴拉迦的兒子以利戶發怒了；他向約伯發怒，因為他在 神面前自以為義。

en: He burned with anger also at Job's three friends because they had found no answer, although they had declared Job to be in the wrong.
zh: 他又向約伯的三個朋友發怒，因為他們雖然仍以約伯為有罪，卻找不到回答的話來。

en: Now Elihu had waited to speak to Job because they were older than he.
zh: 以利戶等待著要向約伯說話，因為他們的年紀都比以利戶大。

en: And when Elihu saw that there was no answer in the mouth of these three men, he burned with anger.
zh: 以利戶一見這三個人的口裡無話回答，他就發怒了。

en: And Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite answered and said: "I am young in years, and you are aged; therefore I was timid and afraid to declare my opinion to you.
zh: 布西人巴拉迦的兒子以利戶回答說： “我年紀輕，你們年紀大， 因此我拘束畏懼，不敢向你們表達我的意見。

en: I said, 'Let days speak, and many years teach wisdom.'
zh: 我心裡想：‘年長的當先說話， 壽高的當以智慧教訓人。’

en: But it is the spirit in man, the breath of the Almighty, that makes him understand.
zh: 但是在人心裡面有靈， 全能者的氣息使人有聰明。

en: It is not the old who are wise, nor the aged who understand what is right.
zh: 年紀大的不都有智慧， 年老的不都能明白是非，

en: Therefore I say, 'Listen to me; let me also declare my opinion.'
zh: 因此我說：‘你們要聽我說話， 我也要說出我的意見。’

en: "Behold, I waited for your words, I listened for your wise sayings, while you searched out what to say.
zh: 你們砌詞說話的時候， 我等待著你們的話， 留心聽你們的理論。

en: I gave you my attention, and, behold, there was none among you who refuted Job or who answered his words.
zh: 我留意聽你們， 不料，你們中間沒有人能駁倒約伯， 駁回他所說的話。

en: Beware lest you say, 'We have found wisdom; God may vanquish him, not a man.'
zh: 你們不要說：‘我們尋得了智慧； 能勝過他的，是 神，不是人。’

en: He has not directed his words against me, and I will not answer him with your speeches.
zh: 約伯沒有用他的話攻擊我， 我也不用你們的話回答他。

en: "They are dismayed; they answer no more; they have not a word to say.
zh: 他們驚惶失措，不再回應， 他們沒有甚麼可說的話了。

en: And shall I wait, because they do not speak, because they stand there, and answer no more?
zh: 因為他們不說話，因為他們站著不再回應， 我就等待嗎？

en: I also will answer with my share; I also will declare my opinion.
zh: 我也要回答我的一份話， 我也要表達我的意見，

en: For I am full of words; the spirit within me constrains me.
zh: 因為我充滿了要說的話， 我裡面的靈催逼我說出來。

en: Behold, my belly is like wine that has no vent; like new wineskins ready to burst.
zh: 我裡面如盛酒的囊，沒有出氣的地方， 又如新酒袋，快要破裂。

en: I must speak, that I may find relief; I must open my lips and answer.
zh: 我要說話，使我可以舒暢， 我要開口回答。

en: I will not show partiality to any man or use flattery toward any person.
zh: 我必不徇人的情面， 也不奉承人，

en: For I do not know how to flatter, else my Maker would soon take me away.
zh: 因為我不曉得怎樣奉承。 不然，我的創造主很快就把我除去。”
